summary: Custom file handlers for pymzML can be enabled by editing the _open function in file_interface.py.
pymzML's FileInterface class provides file handler detection based on file path extension.

pymzML supports the StandardMzml file class for accessing uncompressed mzML files. pymzML supports the StandardGzip file class for accessing gzip-compressed mzML files. pymzML supports the IndexedGzip file class for accessing indexed gzip-c
